problem id: 77804b32
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  10010101 -> 11001011
  11110110 -> 01111111
  01000011 -> 10100101
  10101100 -> 01011110
  00111000 -> 00011111
  01111100 -> 00111111
  10001011 -> 11001101
  10110000 -> 01011011
  00100100 -> 00010010
  10000011 -> 11001001

query: 00101000
predicted answer: 00010110
